_comment: Job archetypes keyed by post-emergence location id. Each archetype is a skeleton Claude personalizes into a job bundle card at runtime. See emergence/docs/job_bundle_guidelines.md for the generation contract.

_archetype_schema.title: short display title
_archetype_schema.daily_loop_hint: one-line gist of what the PC does day-to-day
_archetype_schema.skill_tilts_hint: list of canonical skill ids this job exercises
_archetype_schema.theme_tags: bucket tags used by the engine sampler: old_skills | power_based | hybrid | combat_heavy | post_apoc_generic
_archetype_schema.notes: author notes for Claude; tone, tension, flavor

manhattan_fragment.title: Echo Watcher, Lower Manhattan Perimeter
manhattan_fragment.daily_loop_hint: Log who enters the Financial District's memory-eating Echo, who comes out, and who comes out wrong.
manhattan_fragment.starting_sublocation_hint: a 14th Street watchroom above a shuttered drugstore
manhattan_fragment.notes: Quiet work until it isn't. Three of the last watch rotation came back missing days.

manhattan_fragment.title: Kinetic Breacher for a Salvage Crew
manhattan_fragment.daily_loop_hint: Open sealed vault doors and collapsed stairwells in dead Midtown towers; crew pushes in behind you.
manhattan_fragment.starting_sublocation_hint: a crew house on 48th and 10th, next to a cleared parking garage
manhattan_fragment.notes: Your power is why they keep you. Overuse mineralizes tissue; crew notices when you start limping.

manhattan_fragment.title: Echo Diver
manhattan_fragment.daily_loop_hint: Short expeditions into Lower Manhattan salvaging gold, records, and bearer paper; memory loss is the wage.
manhattan_fragment.starting_sublocation_hint: a dive house on Canal Street where divers recompile what they lost
manhattan_fragment.notes: The Echo takes days at a time. Divers keep journals they read to each other afterwards.

manhattan_fragment.title: Wretch Hunter Under Contract
manhattan_fragment.daily_loop_hint: Clear Wretch nests from tower floors before salvage crews enter; paid per confirmed kill.
manhattan_fragment.starting_sublocation_hint: a rented room above a butcher shop on 9th Avenue
manhattan_fragment.notes: Violent, direct, profitable. Wretches still wear scraps of who they used to be.

manhattan_fragment.title: Fragment Medic
manhattan_fragment.daily_loop_hint: Treat Echo exposure, Wretch bites, and crew injuries from a walk-up clinic near Hell's Kitchen.
manhattan_fragment.notes: Patients arrive missing days, bleeding oddly, or changed. You learn to ask which.

manhattan_fragment.title: Salvage Broker, Midtown Corridor
manhattan_fragment.daily_loop_hint: Track crews pulling material from dead towers; broker between scavengers and Brooklyn buyers.
manhattan_fragment.starting_sublocation_hint: a back office above a freight yard on 11th Avenue
manhattan_fragment.notes: Paperwork, handshakes, margins. Violence is delegated to the people whose margins you set.

brooklyn_tower_lords.title: Auratic Enforcer on Tower Retinue
brooklyn_tower_lords.daily_loop_hint: Walk ahead of the lord's retinue projecting a dread-zone; negotiations go differently when you're present.
brooklyn_tower_lords.starting_sublocation_hint: retainer quarters in a Williamsburg tower's upper floors
brooklyn_tower_lords.notes: The zone fixes your mood toward dread over time. Older auratics are all a little afraid.

brooklyn_tower_lords.title: Kinetic Wire Walker
brooklyn_tower_lords.daily_loop_hint: Carry sealed messages rooftop-to-rooftop across Tower districts; kinetic leaps over gaps no one else can cross.
brooklyn_tower_lords.starting_sublocation_hint: a messenger's loft in a Prospect Heights tower
brooklyn_tower_lords.notes: Fast, visible, trusted with secrets. Rival Tower Lords will pay to read what you carry.

brooklyn_tower_lords.title: Aide to a Tower Captain
brooklyn_tower_lords.daily_loop_hint: Muster lists, patrol routes, intake of newcomers at the Tower's main lift.
brooklyn_tower_lords.starting_sublocation_hint: a corner office in a Williamsburg high-rise
brooklyn_tower_lords.notes: Politics, protocol, petty rivalries. The lord is in the next room. So is the knife.

brooklyn_tower_lords.title: Salvage Breacher Crew Lead
brooklyn_tower_lords.daily_loop_hint: Lead a five-person crew into dead blocks; your power opens what theirs can't.
brooklyn_tower_lords.starting_sublocation_hint: a rigged warehouse at the Navy Yard edge
brooklyn_tower_lords.notes: Physical, material, dangerous. Your crew's families eat because you don't stop pushing through the wall.

brooklyn_tower_lords.title: Telepathic Interrogator on Retainer
brooklyn_tower_lords.daily_loop_hint: Extract what prisoners won't say for a Tower Lord; sit quietly beside deals and report afterwards.
brooklyn_tower_lords.starting_sublocation_hint: a small chamber adjacent to the lord's council room
brooklyn_tower_lords.notes: You feel every mind you touch. The memory of what you pull out does not stay on the other side.

brooklyn_tower_lords.title: Tower Commune Tutor
brooklyn_tower_lords.daily_loop_hint: Run literacy and history for Tower children; mediate minor disputes among their parents.
brooklyn_tower_lords.starting_sublocation_hint: a cleared restaurant floor in a Prospect Heights tower
brooklyn_tower_lords.notes: Soft power. You know everyone's children. That is leverage whether you want it or not.

queens_commonage.title: Voice in the Commune's Network
queens_commonage.daily_loop_hint: Participate in the telepathic network that coordinates Queens-wide commune decisions; carry collective thought between council sessions.
queens_commonage.starting_sublocation_hint: a meeting hall in the converted Jamaica Performing Arts Center
queens_commonage.notes: Your thoughts are not only yours. That is the price and the point.

queens_commonage.title: Biokinetic Cultivator
queens_commonage.daily_loop_hint: Walk the commune's fields enhancing yield through direct biokinetic contact; consult with seasonal ritualists.
queens_commonage.starting_sublocation_hint: a field station at the Flushing Meadows barn complex
queens_commonage.notes: Overuse fixes your scent and shape toward plant life. Older cultivators sleep outdoors.

queens_commonage.title: Migrant Screener at the Commonage Border
queens_commonage.daily_loop_hint: Read intent on incoming migrants at the Brooklyn-Queens line; approve, refer, or turn away.
queens_commonage.starting_sublocation_hint: a screening post at the Myrtle-Broadway line
queens_commonage.notes: You will turn away people who needed in. You will approve people who become problems. The network reviews you monthly.

queens_commonage.title: Commonage Border Captain
queens_commonage.daily_loop_hint: Command a watch station at the Brooklyn line; screen armed parties, negotiate with Tower patrols, maintain patrol rotations.
queens_commonage.starting_sublocation_hint: a sandbagged intersection at the Myrtle-Broadway line
queens_commonage.notes: Disciplined violence. Most days are paperwork. Some days aren't and you're the one who signs for it.

queens_commonage.title: Trade Envoy to the Bourse
queens_commonage.daily_loop_hint: Regular runs to Philadelphia; negotiate grain-for-copper contracts with Bourse factors.
queens_commonage.starting_sublocation_hint: an envoy's quarters near the Long Island City rail junction
queens_commonage.notes: Mobile. Trusted. Exposed. The Iron Crown does not approve of your route.

queens_commonage.title: Commune Ritual Medic
queens_commonage.daily_loop_hint: Rounds through the Commonage's healing halls; participate in the perceptual rituals that bind decisions.
queens_commonage.starting_sublocation_hint: a converted school auditorium in Jamaica, now a healing hall
queens_commonage.notes: Participating in the rituals changes you. That is the cost of practicing here.

staten_citadel.title: Teleport Crew Lieutenant
staten_citadel.daily_loop_hint: Command one of Chen's short-range teleport crews moving contraband across the harbor without touching a boat.
staten_citadel.starting_sublocation_hint: a crew bunkhouse in the Todt Hill compound
staten_citadel.notes: Teleporters burn out fast. Chen rotates crews every six months. You know your expiration date.

staten_citadel.title: Foresight Screener at the Customs Line
staten_citadel.daily_loop_hint: Brief-precog clerk flagging contraband on arriving salvage vessels before it lands; report anomalies upward.
staten_citadel.starting_sublocation_hint: a screening booth on the converted Ferry Terminal's main floor
staten_citadel.notes: You see seconds ahead. Sometimes what you see isn't what happens. Chen wants the discrepancies logged.

staten_citadel.title: Assistant Harbor Master
staten_citadel.daily_loop_hint: Track salvage manifests entering the harbor; apply the Citadel's toll schedule under Chen's deputies.
staten_citadel.starting_sublocation_hint: a dockside office in the converted Ferry Terminal
staten_citadel.notes: Chen sees further than he should. He also sees you. Your numbers had better reconcile.

staten_citadel.title: Toll Enforcer on the Harbor Approach
staten_citadel.daily_loop_hint: Board salvage vessels at the Citadel's toll lines; collect duty or confiscate cargo.
staten_citadel.starting_sublocation_hint: a patrol cutter moored at Stapleton
staten_citadel.notes: Direct work. Some captains remember your face. Some of them come back with friends.

staten_citadel.title: Citadel Records Clerk
staten_citadel.daily_loop_hint: Maintain the Citadel's archive of seized manifests; reconcile ledgers with Chen's spatial projections.
staten_citadel.starting_sublocation_hint: the vault below the Citadel's central hall
staten_citadel.notes: Quiet, bookish, dangerous. The records know things the recorders don't, and sometimes share them.

staten_citadel.title: Surgeon for Temporal-Spatial Injuries
staten_citadel.daily_loop_hint: Treat Citadel specialists whose bodies return from teleport jumps slightly wrong; document what you reset and what you can't.
staten_citadel.starting_sublocation_hint: a private clinic in the Todt Hill compound
staten_citadel.notes: The injuries don't always make sense. Record what you see; submit to Chen. Older patients stop being quite themselves.

flushing_edison_c_cluster.title: Silver-Hand Metallurgist
flushing_edison_c_cluster.daily_loop_hint: Shape copper, bronze, and steel directly through palm contact; fulfill Bourse and Commonage commissions under Twelve Hands oversight.
flushing_edison_c_cluster.starting_sublocation_hint: a workshop in a Flushing converted restaurant block
flushing_edison_c_cluster.notes: The palms mineralize with use. Shapers over forty can't close their hands all the way. It is understood and not discussed.

flushing_edison_c_cluster.title: Cluster Defender
flushing_edison_c_cluster.daily_loop_hint: Armed guard work at the Flushing and Edison perimeters; matter-shaping lets you make blades and plate as needed.
flushing_edison_c_cluster.starting_sublocation_hint: a guard house at the Kissena Boulevard cluster gate
flushing_edison_c_cluster.notes: The cluster trains its defenders from childhood. Outsiders are not given this work; cluster-born take it as obligation.

flushing_edison_c_cluster.title: Edison Township Liaison
flushing_edison_c_cluster.daily_loop_hint: Shuttle between Flushing and the Edison cluster; coordinate shipments, carry private correspondence.
flushing_edison_c_cluster.starting_sublocation_hint: an envoy's room in Edison's council compound
flushing_edison_c_cluster.notes: The Iron Crown considers your route theirs. They are wrong but vocal, and occasionally armed.

flushing_edison_c_cluster.title: Twelve Hands Workshop Foreman
flushing_edison_c_cluster.daily_loop_hint: Oversee a production workshop of five shapers and ten finishers; enforce Twelve Hands craft standards.
flushing_edison_c_cluster.starting_sublocation_hint: a converted dining hall workshop on Main Street Flushing
flushing_edison_c_cluster.notes: Your shapers are family or family-adjacent. Their injuries are your responsibility; so is their output.

flushing_edison_c_cluster.title: Cluster Physician
flushing_edison_c_cluster.daily_loop_hint: Medical care for Silver-Hand physiology; treat palm mineralization, species-specific complications, and outside referrals.
flushing_edison_c_cluster.starting_sublocation_hint: the cluster's main clinic near Main Street Flushing
flushing_edison_c_cluster.notes: Silver-Hand physiology is different. Old textbooks only get you so far; the cluster keeps its own notes.

flushing_edison_c_cluster.title: Outside Courier for the Cluster
flushing_edison_c_cluster.daily_loop_hint: Move finished goods and sealed correspondence through non-cluster territory; carry Twelve Hands paperwork that keeps you alive.
flushing_edison_c_cluster.starting_sublocation_hint: a courier's room near the LIRR Flushing terminal
flushing_edison_c_cluster.notes: The cluster trusts you because an elder vouched. Fail a run and that vouch goes elsewhere.

iron_crown_newark.title: Volk's Kinetic Enforcer
iron_crown_newark.daily_loop_hint: Accompany Iron Crown collection teams; your power is the implicit threat that makes most collections peaceful.
iron_crown_newark.starting_sublocation_hint: a barracks adjacent to the Newark governance compound
iron_crown_newark.notes: Volk rewards reliable violence. Your tier is known and logged. Reluctance is logged too.

iron_crown_newark.title: Iron Crown Dread-Zone Interrogator
iron_crown_newark.daily_loop_hint: Cast a dread-zone during formal interrogations; break resistance without leaving marks.
iron_crown_newark.starting_sublocation_hint: a windowless room off the Essex County courthouse basement
iron_crown_newark.notes: The zone settles your own mood toward dread over years. You sleep with a lamp on.

iron_crown_newark.title: Patrol Lieutenant
iron_crown_newark.daily_loop_hint: Lead a six-person patrol through Essex County checkpoint rotations; report weekly to the district captain.
iron_crown_newark.starting_sublocation_hint: a patrol barracks in the Ironbound
iron_crown_newark.notes: Direct power over people who cannot push back. The villages you patrol don't love you. Your squad does, mostly.

iron_crown_newark.title: Port Manifest Clerk
iron_crown_newark.daily_loop_hint: Process cargo manifests at Port Newark; apply Crown duty; flag smuggling patterns to intelligence officers.
iron_crown_newark.starting_sublocation_hint: a customs office on the Newark waterfront
iron_crown_newark.notes: Paperwork as weapon. What you write sends people to the basement interrogator.

iron_crown_newark.title: Contract Field Medic
iron_crown_newark.daily_loop_hint: Roving medic on violent assignments; patch wounds under fire; sign the reports the captain dictates.
iron_crown_newark.starting_sublocation_hint: a forward medical tent at a rotating rural station
iron_crown_newark.notes: You see what the reports don't mention. You decide what to do about it. Everyone who decides wrong disappears.

iron_crown_newark.title: Crown Informant Runner
iron_crown_newark.daily_loop_hint: Maintain a net of civilian informants across Newark neighborhoods; pay in scrip, collect in names.
iron_crown_newark.starting_sublocation_hint: a third-floor walkup in the Ironbound, rent paid by the Crown
iron_crown_newark.notes: Your informants believe they're yours. The Crown believes they're the Crown's. Nobody owns a person completely; everybody tries.

yonkers_compact.title: Biokinetic Healer Under the Three Judges
yonkers_compact.daily_loop_hint: Treat wounds and chronic illness through direct biokinetic contact; consult the Judges on cases beyond personal capacity.
yonkers_compact.starting_sublocation_hint: the converted Yonkers General Hospital central ward
yonkers_compact.notes: Your hands change over years. Your patients' wounds inform your body as often as the other way around.

yonkers_compact.title: Ritual Apprentice to a Judge
yonkers_compact.daily_loop_hint: Learn the Compact's biokinetic practice under one of the Three; assist in decisions that bind the commune.
yonkers_compact.starting_sublocation_hint: the Judge's chambers beneath the old Untermyer estate
yonkers_compact.notes: You will change. You know this going in. Your teachers have changed too; ask them about it only after five years.

yonkers_compact.title: Commune Surgeon
yonkers_compact.daily_loop_hint: Surgical work in the Compact's central clinic; consult the Judges on difficult cases.
yonkers_compact.starting_sublocation_hint: the converted Yonkers General Hospital top floor
yonkers_compact.notes: The Judges consult. Your practice runs within what they accept. A disagreement with a Judge is never only about medicine.

yonkers_compact.title: Agricultural Field Coordinator
yonkers_compact.daily_loop_hint: Manage biokinetic-supplemented crop yields in Westchester; coordinate with the Compact's seasonal rituals.
yonkers_compact.starting_sublocation_hint: a field office near the Saw Mill Parkway
yonkers_compact.notes: Rituals organize the week. Rain comes when the ritual is right. Or doesn't, and then the Judges visit.

yonkers_compact.title: Judges' Escort Captain
yonkers_compact.daily_loop_hint: Command the armed escort for any Judge traveling outside the Compact; Yonkers's only formal combat unit.
yonkers_compact.starting_sublocation_hint: a barracks behind the Untermyer estate walls
yonkers_compact.notes: Your charge is one of the three most important people in the Hudson Valley. Preston watches. Volk watches. You watch everything.

yonkers_compact.title: Compact Border Envoy
yonkers_compact.daily_loop_hint: Diplomatic runs to Peekskill and the Catskill periphery; carry Judge-authorized terms.
yonkers_compact.starting_sublocation_hint: an envoy's quarters in Yonkers's converted city hall
yonkers_compact.notes: Your word carries weight because the Judges speak through you. Don't improvise; they dislike surprises.

peekskill_bear_house.title: Foresight Reactor Technician
peekskill_bear_house.daily_loop_hint: Use brief-precog to adjust reactor systems seconds before the current state demands; the reactor keeps running because you do.
peekskill_bear_house.notes: You see seconds ahead. The seconds are often correct. The ones that aren't teach you to act on probability, not certainty.

peekskill_bear_house.title: Kinetic Lift Crew Chief
peekskill_bear_house.daily_loop_hint: Lead the kinetic-specialist crew that moves reactor components no crane can reach; power is the daily tool.
peekskill_bear_house.notes: Heavy power use mineralizes over years. The Bear-House pays for the shortened career.

peekskill_bear_house.title: Fabrication Yard Foreman
peekskill_bear_house.daily_loop_hint: Oversee metallurgical fabrication crews in the yards; coordinate material flow with the reactor team.
peekskill_bear_house.starting_sublocation_hint: the main fabrication floor on the Hudson
peekskill_bear_house.notes: Output is watched from above and below. The Throne upriver wants the steel. So do the Bourse and the Crown.

peekskill_bear_house.title: Upriver Border Scout
peekskill_bear_house.daily_loop_hint: Patrol the Bear-House's northern perimeter; watch for Catskill Throne incursions; trade with independents.
peekskill_bear_house.starting_sublocation_hint: a forward outpost above Cold Spring
peekskill_bear_house.notes: Solitary. The woods are not empty. Preston's patrols cross lines they are not supposed to cross.

peekskill_bear_house.title: Reactor Medic
peekskill_bear_house.daily_loop_hint: Radiological and trauma care for crew at the Bear-House reactor; monitor chronic exposures.
peekskill_bear_house.notes: The work is quiet until it isn't. The Bear-House pays well for silence.

peekskill_bear_house.title: Trade Factor for Bear-House Metal
peekskill_bear_house.daily_loop_hint: Broker steel and copper exports; negotiate with Bourse agents and Lehigh representatives.
peekskill_bear_house.starting_sublocation_hint: a trade hall beside the Peekskill wharfs
peekskill_bear_house.notes: The Bear-House wants scale. The buyers want leverage. You are in the middle, and the middle is where both sides apply pressure.

central_jersey_league.title: Biokinetic Field Agent
central_jersey_league.daily_loop_hint: Tour League farms enhancing yields, treating blight, and consulting on seasonal plans; you are the League's most requested visitor.
central_jersey_league.starting_sublocation_hint: a rented room in New Brunswick and a wagon-kit
central_jersey_league.notes: Overuse fixes your scent toward soil. Your sleep becomes shallow; your hearing sharpens toward growth and decay.

central_jersey_league.title: Perceptual Dispute Mediator
central_jersey_league.daily_loop_hint: Use emotion-reading and subtle influence to mediate township disputes; flag bad-faith actors to the League council.
central_jersey_league.starting_sublocation_hint: a rented office in a Middlesex County crossroads town
central_jersey_league.notes: Reading people daily settles something in you toward detachment. Older mediators have reputations for coldness.

central_jersey_league.title: Mutual-Defense Captain
central_jersey_league.daily_loop_hint: Command a township militia rotation; train new recruits; coordinate with neighboring captains against raiders and Crown pressure.
central_jersey_league.starting_sublocation_hint: a militia barracks at a Middlesex crossroads
central_jersey_league.notes: Local volunteers. Local weapons. Local stakes. When the Crown rolls a column through, it is your road they roll on.

central_jersey_league.title: Township Physician
central_jersey_league.daily_loop_hint: Serve one of the League's 15 member townships as principal medical officer; report to the town council.
central_jersey_league.starting_sublocation_hint: a converted schoolhouse clinic in a Middlesex County town
central_jersey_league.notes: Community-rooted. Everyone knows your patients. Everyone notices who you treat first.

central_jersey_league.title: Circuit-Riding Negotiator
central_jersey_league.daily_loop_hint: Travel among League townships mediating disputes; enforce the League's mutual-defense accords.
central_jersey_league.starting_sublocation_hint: a rented room in New Brunswick serving as your base
central_jersey_league.notes: Always moving. Always negotiating. Always one failed mediation from a township-level war.

central_jersey_league.title: Intertownship Caravan Master
central_jersey_league.daily_loop_hint: Run weekly caravans linking League townships; manage teamsters, armed escort, and cargo manifests.
central_jersey_league.starting_sublocation_hint: a waggon yard outside New Brunswick
central_jersey_league.notes: Weather, road condition, raider movement, Crown patrol. Any of the four can end a week's work.

princeton_accord.title: Precognitive Field Researcher
princeton_accord.daily_loop_hint: Document manifestation patterns across the region using brief-foresight; publish under Accord seal.
princeton_accord.starting_sublocation_hint: a study in the old Firestone Library
princeton_accord.notes: What you write about, you eventually meet. The Accord provides a modest travel stipend and no protection.

princeton_accord.title: Accord Archive Warden
princeton_accord.daily_loop_hint: Armed guard for the Accord's restricted archive; screen scholars, intercept thieves, respond to assassin contracts.
princeton_accord.starting_sublocation_hint: the archive sublevel under Firestone Library
princeton_accord.notes: The archive holds what others would kill to read. Sometimes they do. Your responses shape what future scholars can touch.

princeton_accord.title: Visiting Scholar on Post-Onset Phenomena
princeton_accord.daily_loop_hint: Document manifestations across the region; publish under Accord seal; correspond with Bourse and Commonage researchers.
princeton_accord.starting_sublocation_hint: a study in the old Firestone Library
princeton_accord.notes: Dangerous work. What you write about, you eventually meet.

princeton_accord.title: Accord Hall Clerk
princeton_accord.daily_loop_hint: Maintain the Accord's legal archives; process town petitions; draft response correspondence.
princeton_accord.starting_sublocation_hint: the university's old McCosh Hall, now the Accord archive
princeton_accord.notes: Words are policy. Your memos shape months.

princeton_accord.title: Teaching Physician at the Accord School
princeton_accord.daily_loop_hint: Train new medics in the Accord's reopened medical school; maintain a research practice.
princeton_accord.starting_sublocation_hint: a lecture hall in the reopened medical school
princeton_accord.notes: Contemplative work. The Accord is cautious. So is your research, because the Accord is cautious.

princeton_accord.title: Accord Diplomat
princeton_accord.daily_loop_hint: Shuttle among Princeton, Philadelphia, and New Brunswick carrying Accord positions; maintain back-channel relationships.
princeton_accord.starting_sublocation_hint: a diplomat's office in Nassau Hall
princeton_accord.notes: Words over violence. Until words fail and you carry news back.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Trust-Zone Contract Auditor
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Cast an auratic trust-zone at major contract signings; the Bourse pays you so deceivers slip.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: a signing chamber off the Old Customs hall
philadelphia_bourse.notes: The zone fixes your own honesty toward compulsive over years. You stop being able to lie comfortably, even when you should.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Temporal-Spatial Courier
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Short-teleport sealed Bourse correspondence between Philadelphia and paired drop sites in Princeton, Baltimore, and New Brunswick.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: a courier's room near the Reading Terminal
philadelphia_bourse.notes: Teleporters are rare and burn out in a decade. The Bourse pays in copper that doesn't buy you a second career.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Bourse Market Enforcer
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Investigate copper fraud, short-weighting, and false ledger entries; escalate to arrest when merchant house principals agree.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: a detail office near Independence Hall
philadelphia_bourse.notes: Quiet violence. The Bourse prefers arrests to shootings. The Holding sometimes forces the other option.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Attending at a Bourse-Chartered Clinic
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Surgical attending at a Rittenhouse clinic serving merchant scions and their enforcers.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: a chartered clinic on Walnut Street near Rittenhouse Square
philadelphia_bourse.notes: Comfortable. Compromised. The Bourse protects its own; so do you, whether you intend to or not.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Copper-Currency Factor
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Manage copper ledger balances for a mercantile house; settle inter-faction accounts at Bourse quarterly sessions.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: a counting house on Second Street near the Old Customs
philadelphia_bourse.notes: Money as language. Small errors cascade into large favors owed.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Caravan Escort Captain
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Lead armed escorts on Bourse trade routes through New Jersey and Delaware; negotiate passage with township militias.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: a caravan yard north of Fishtown
philadelphia_bourse.notes: The roads teach you what maps don't. Your escort's names you remember; the ones you lose you also remember.

philadelphia_bourse.title: Civic Archivist at the Old Hall
philadelphia_bourse.daily_loop_hint: Maintain the Bourse's civic records; handle petitioner correspondence; mediate disputes involving record discrepancies.
philadelphia_bourse.starting_sublocation_hint: the archive vault beneath Independence Hall's east wing
philadelphia_bourse.notes: History here is contested. You are one of the contests.

south_philly_holding.title: Dreng's Kinetic Bruiser
south_philly_holding.daily_loop_hint: Accompany collection rounds as the visible threat; kinetic power closes most disputes before they start.
south_philly_holding.starting_sublocation_hint: a ward post on Snyder Avenue
south_philly_holding.notes: Visible power. Dreng likes it visible. Your tissue is starting to mineralize; Dreng has not asked.

south_philly_holding.title: Perceptual Collector
south_philly_holding.daily_loop_hint: Read debtors' emotional state during collection visits; identify who will pay, who will flee, who is already planning violence.
south_philly_holding.starting_sublocation_hint: a rowhouse office above a Snyder Avenue bar
south_philly_holding.notes: You know too much about your neighbors. The knowledge stays with you after shift.

south_philly_holding.title: Enforcer Lieutenant
south_philly_holding.daily_loop_hint: Command a ward patrol for Dreng's holding; collect protection fees; escalate disputes to the captain.
south_philly_holding.starting_sublocation_hint: a ward post on Snyder Avenue
south_philly_holding.notes: Loyalty is the currency. Loyalty to Dreng, above the Bourse, above the law, above whatever is left of conscience.

south_philly_holding.title: Rail Runner on the South Philly Spurs
south_philly_holding.daily_loop_hint: Work one of the rail crews Dreng uses for freight; handle loading, security, and occasional cargo modification.
south_philly_holding.starting_sublocation_hint: a rail yard near the old stadium complexes
south_philly_holding.notes: Physical, direct. Cargo vanishing is not your problem until someone asks; by then you have an answer ready.

south_philly_holding.title: Navy Yard Medic
south_philly_holding.daily_loop_hint: Treat industrial and combat injuries at Dreng's Navy Yard infirmary; patch enforcers and dock crews alike.
south_philly_holding.starting_sublocation_hint: an infirmary at the gate of the Philadelphia Navy Yard
south_philly_holding.notes: Dreng is a name spoken quietly. The work is not quiet.

south_philly_holding.title: Delaware River Smuggler-Courier
south_philly_holding.daily_loop_hint: Move cargo between South Philly docks and Camden backwaters; carry Dreng's paperwork that makes patrols look the other way.
south_philly_holding.starting_sublocation_hint: a rented boathouse at Penn's Landing
south_philly_holding.notes: Your route crosses into Camden. Camden is where Doctor Pale lives. You avoid the wrong slips.

lehigh_principalities.title: Kinetic Mine Specialist
lehigh_principalities.daily_loop_hint: Work collapse recovery and face-breaking in the deep seams; kinetic power reaches what picks cannot.
lehigh_principalities.starting_sublocation_hint: a pithead shack at the Jim Thorpe mine entrance
lehigh_principalities.notes: The lord pays bonus for every face you break. Your hands are slowly becoming stone; you knew this when you signed.

lehigh_principalities.title: Biokinetic Mine Healer
lehigh_principalities.daily_loop_hint: Treat miner lung and trauma through direct biokinetic practice; travel between principality mining towns weekly.
lehigh_principalities.starting_sublocation_hint: a traveler's kit and a room in each mining town
lehigh_principalities.notes: You know which lords let workers suffer. Your reports to the reformist lord are read. The other lords know about the reports.

lehigh_principalities.title: Mine Superintendent
lehigh_principalities.daily_loop_hint: Oversee coal extraction for a principality; maintain Sun-Worn agricultural integration contracts; report output to the lord.
lehigh_principalities.starting_sublocation_hint: an office at the Jim Thorpe mine entrance
lehigh_principalities.notes: Output is watched from above and below.

lehigh_principalities.title: Coal Broker to Downstream Buyers
lehigh_principalities.daily_loop_hint: Negotiate coal shipments to the Bourse, Bear-House, and Iron Crown; manage competing lords' expectations.
lehigh_principalities.starting_sublocation_hint: a trade office at the Allentown rail junction
lehigh_principalities.notes: Everyone wants more than you can deliver.

lehigh_principalities.title: Principality Retainer Captain
lehigh_principalities.daily_loop_hint: Command a lord's armed retinue; enforce his holdings, escort his convoys, represent his banner at regional meets.
lehigh_principalities.starting_sublocation_hint: a retainer barracks at a Bethlehem manor
lehigh_principalities.notes: The twelve principalities fight each other at the edges. Your lord's name is what you defend; the defense is often literal.

lehigh_principalities.title: Coal-Lord's House Medic
lehigh_principalities.daily_loop_hint: Serve a principality's household as principal medic; occasionally treat mine workers in the lord's good graces.
lehigh_principalities.starting_sublocation_hint: a wing of a Bethlehem manor house
lehigh_principalities.notes: The lord eats well. His workers, less. You eat with the lord.

crabclaw_baltimore.title: Biokinetic Fishery Steward
crabclaw_baltimore.daily_loop_hint: Oversee the biokinetic-altered fisheries that feed a quarter of the region; adjust schools through direct power.
crabclaw_baltimore.starting_sublocation_hint: a wharf steading near Fells Point
crabclaw_baltimore.notes: You smell of brine and fish regardless of season. Your sleep is timed to tides.

crabclaw_baltimore.title: Kinetic Bay Swimmer
crabclaw_baltimore.daily_loop_hint: Enhanced-strength swimmer working wrecks in the upper bay at depths others cannot reach; recover materiel for the Confederation.
crabclaw_baltimore.notes: The bay hides more than it shows. Some of what you bring up wasn't metal. Some of what's down there watches you swim.

crabclaw_baltimore.title: Fishery Foreman
crabclaw_baltimore.daily_loop_hint: Coordinate a lord's fishing fleet; handle daily catch ledgers; manage crew disputes.
crabclaw_baltimore.notes: The lords compete visibly. Your fleet's numbers matter beyond the catch.

crabclaw_baltimore.title: Salvage Diver
crabclaw_baltimore.daily_loop_hint: Dive on sunken wrecks in the Patapsco and upper bay; recover materiel for the Confederation; manage your own crew.
crabclaw_baltimore.notes: The bay is cold. The wrecks are full. You learn which are claimed and which are claimable.

crabclaw_baltimore.title: Inter-Lord Diplomat
crabclaw_baltimore.daily_loop_hint: Mediate disputes among the three Crabclaw lords; carry confidential terms between their households.
crabclaw_baltimore.starting_sublocation_hint: neutral quarters at an inner-harbor inn
crabclaw_baltimore.notes: Neutrality must be performed daily. Any slip is fatal.

crabclaw_baltimore.title: Harbor Physician
crabclaw_baltimore.daily_loop_hint: Serve the Confederation as a harbor-district physician; treat fishermen, dockworkers, and the occasional crew captain.
crabclaw_baltimore.notes: Salt and fish. Work is tidal. Some of your patients are not quite the shape they used to be.

delmarva_harvest.title: Biokinetic Agronomist
delmarva_harvest.daily_loop_hint: Enhance and repair Harvest Lord fields through direct biokinetic practice; the Lord's yield depends on your circuit.
delmarva_harvest.starting_sublocation_hint: estate guest quarters in Queen Anne's County
delmarva_harvest.notes: The Lord's fields feed a city. Your circuit cannot afford illness. Your body slowly reshapes toward growing things.

delmarva_harvest.title: Perceptual Labor Overseer
delmarva_harvest.daily_loop_hint: Read worker emotional state across a Harvest estate; flag dissent, exhaustion, and theft to the Lord's steward.
delmarva_harvest.starting_sublocation_hint: a steward's office in an Easton estate
delmarva_harvest.notes: You know what the workers feel. You sign reports that send some of them away. The knowledge is the job.

delmarva_harvest.title: Harvest Lord Enforcer
delmarva_harvest.daily_loop_hint: Armed retainer for a Harvest Lord; escort tribute shipments, discipline labor, respond to rival-lord pressure.
delmarva_harvest.starting_sublocation_hint: an enforcer barracks beside an Easton estate
delmarva_harvest.notes: The six lords and the twelve minor lords do not like each other. Your Lord's banner is what you defend.

delmarva_harvest.title: Grain Factor for Regional Export
delmarva_harvest.daily_loop_hint: Negotiate bulk grain export contracts with the Bourse and Confederation buyers; represent a Harvest Lord's interests.
delmarva_harvest.starting_sublocation_hint: a grain exchange office at the Easton wharf
delmarva_harvest.notes: Peaceful trade on the surface. The lords do not forget leverage.

delmarva_harvest.title: Estate Physician to a Harvest Lord
delmarva_harvest.daily_loop_hint: Serve a biokinetic Lord as household physician; manage the quiet reports of biokinetic consultation.
delmarva_harvest.starting_sublocation_hint: a wing in an Easton estate house
delmarva_harvest.notes: The Lord's biokinetic practice touches the household. You learn its rhythms and the household's secrets along with them.

delmarva_harvest.title: Waterman on the Eastern Bay
delmarva_harvest.daily_loop_hint: Work a crab and oyster boat along the Eastern Shore; haul to Lord-controlled markets.
delmarva_harvest.starting_sublocation_hint: a working deadrise moored at St. Michaels
delmarva_harvest.notes: Weather dictates weeks. So do the lords' export quotas.

fed_continuity_dc.title: Kinetic Military Policeman
fed_continuity_dc.daily_loop_hint: Stand watch at Pentagon-area checkpoints as the visible kinetic response; respond to incidents that exceed conventional forces.
fed_continuity_dc.starting_sublocation_hint: a barracks on the Pentagon grounds
fed_continuity_dc.notes: The uniform is still taken seriously in Arlington. The Command pays in scrip; the kinetic bonus is in grain.

fed_continuity_dc.title: Continuity Precog Field Scout
fed_continuity_dc.daily_loop_hint: Brief-foresight scout attached to Continuity field parties; use micro-precog to flag ambushes and route hazards.
fed_continuity_dc.starting_sublocation_hint: a kit room in a Georgetown safehouse
fed_continuity_dc.notes: Foresight burns out fast in the field. Scouts rotate off line after three years. The Command has not told you your rotation date.

fed_continuity_dc.title: Continuity Field Investigator
fed_continuity_dc.daily_loop_hint: Investigate anomalies flagged by the archive; travel under Continuity papers; report findings to a senior officer.
fed_continuity_dc.starting_sublocation_hint: a traveler's kit and a room at a Georgetown safehouse
fed_continuity_dc.notes: You go where the archive points. The archive is not always reliable. Sometimes it is reliable and you wish it weren't.

fed_continuity_dc.title: Continuity Archive Officer
fed_continuity_dc.daily_loop_hint: Maintain restricted records; process reconstruction reports from regional agents; flag anomalies for senior officers.
fed_continuity_dc.starting_sublocation_hint: a secure archive below Capitol Hill
fed_continuity_dc.notes: You see patterns the Command prefers unseen.

fed_continuity_dc.title: Continuity Medical Officer
fed_continuity_dc.daily_loop_hint: Serve as uniformed physician within the Fed Continuity Command's medical corps; treat uniformed personnel and their families.
fed_continuity_dc.notes: Paperwork and denial. The Command believes it still functions; your patients often believe the same.

fed_continuity_dc.title: District Liaison Officer
fed_continuity_dc.daily_loop_hint: Represent Continuity authority to Arlington and DC neighborhoods; collect reports, dispense limited aid, manage civil disputes.
fed_continuity_dc.notes: The uniform still means something. Mostly.

catskill_throne.title: Preston's Kinetic Retainer
catskill_throne.daily_loop_hint: Lower-tier kinetic attached to Preston's personal retinue; carry his enforcement where needed, absorb what a T9 should not waste effort on.
catskill_throne.starting_sublocation_hint: a retainer wing at the Throne's seat at Mount Tremper
catskill_throne.notes: Preston lost the ability to feel fear. He expects you to feel the minimum required amount. Your fear is data to him.

catskill_throne.title: Mountain Precog Scout
catskill_throne.daily_loop_hint: Patrol the Throne's forested margins with brief-precog; catch ambushes and Warped encounters before they land.
catskill_throne.starting_sublocation_hint: a ranger cabin on the Ashokan Reservoir shore
catskill_throne.notes: The Warped up here are old and clever. Your foresight sometimes shows them waiting; sometimes they show it back.

catskill_throne.title: Warped Liaison
catskill_throne.daily_loop_hint: Diplomat to the intelligent Warped of the Catskills; speak with the T9 wolf, the T10 doe, the bear that remembers too much.
catskill_throne.starting_sublocation_hint: a trail cabin at the Ashokan tributary
catskill_throne.notes: The Warped teach you things. Some of what they teach is true. Some is older than humans and you are not equipped to hold it.

catskill_throne.title: Mountain Pass Warden
catskill_throne.daily_loop_hint: Command a station on the Throne's southern pass; collect tolls from travelers; screen entries to the Throne's territory.
catskill_throne.starting_sublocation_hint: a stone gatehouse at the Pine Hill pass
catskill_throne.notes: Cold, exposed, isolated. Travelers arrive with stories. Some you believe. Some you report upward.

catskill_throne.title: Itinerant Surgeon Among the Hill Towns
catskill_throne.daily_loop_hint: Travel the Throne's hill-town network treating workers and farmers; report on conditions to a Throne retainer.
catskill_throne.starting_sublocation_hint: a traveler's kit and rotating rooms in Throne hill towns
catskill_throne.notes: The Throne is a distant authority up here. Preston's reach is long but uneven.

catskill_throne.title: Throne Forest Ranger
catskill_throne.daily_loop_hint: Patrol the Throne's forested margins; hunt, track, interdict; report wildlife and non-wildlife anomalies.
catskill_throne.starting_sublocation_hint: a ranger cabin on the Ashokan Reservoir shore
catskill_throne.notes: Solitary work. The forest keeps secrets; you catalog some of them. Some catalog you back.

pine_barrens_batsto.title: Hive-Bonded Ranger
pine_barrens_batsto.daily_loop_hint: Move freely through Hive-saturated territory because the plant network reads you as safe; escort Listening members where no outsider can pass.
pine_barrens_batsto.starting_sublocation_hint: a sheltered cabin at the edge of an active Hive patch
pine_barrens_batsto.notes: The bond deepens. You know this going in. Older rangers are not quite people anymore; they are still respected.

pine_barrens_batsto.title: Listener to the One Who Waits
pine_barrens_batsto.daily_loop_hint: Perceptual specialist translating the echoes of the entity; serve as channel between The Listening's leadership and what speaks.
pine_barrens_batsto.starting_sublocation_hint: a cell in the central Batsto ritual complex
pine_barrens_batsto.notes: You change. The listening is the changing. There is no version of this job that does not reshape the listener.

pine_barrens_batsto.title: Apprentice Ritualist
pine_barrens_batsto.daily_loop_hint: Learn the Hive's ritual practice under a senior; contribute to group perceptual work; attend the gatherings that bind the cult.
pine_barrens_batsto.starting_sublocation_hint: a cell in the Batsto ritual complex
pine_barrens_batsto.notes: You will change. The Hive does not hide this. Elders encourage you to write letters to who you were.

pine_barrens_batsto.title: Barrens Perimeter Scout
pine_barrens_batsto.daily_loop_hint: Patrol the Barrens' outer edge; screen approaching travelers; report to the Hive and to the scattered Ong's Hat settlements.
pine_barrens_batsto.starting_sublocation_hint: a scout's camp at the Wharton forest edge
pine_barrens_batsto.notes: The Barrens are unreliable — the trees, the roads, the time. You learn to listen past what your ears report.

pine_barrens_batsto.title: Hive-Trained Medic
pine_barrens_batsto.daily_loop_hint: Treat members of the Listening collective at Batsto; bridge conventional medicine and the Hive's ritual practice.
pine_barrens_batsto.starting_sublocation_hint: an infirmary at the Hive core compound
pine_barrens_batsto.notes: You are inside something that changes you. You chose this, or did not; now you live inside it.

pine_barrens_batsto.title: Ong's Hat Smuggler
pine_barrens_batsto.daily_loop_hint: Move goods and messages between Ong's Hat perimeter settlements and the outside; carry Hive-adjacent cargo under less obvious papers.
pine_barrens_batsto.starting_sublocation_hint: a cabin near Ong's Hat's shifting perimeter
pine_barrens_batsto.notes: The Hive is not your only employer but it is the loudest. Your cargo varies; your route does not.

wide_sighted_diaspora.title: Long-Sight Caravan Scout
wide_sighted_diaspora.daily_loop_hint: Use species long-range vision to screen caravan routes miles ahead; recognize other Wide-Sighted at distances no baseline human can.
wide_sighted_diaspora.starting_sublocation_hint: a scout's room in a West Philadelphia diaspora block
wide_sighted_diaspora.notes: The diaspora is debating whether to declare itself a polity. Your reports inform the vote.

wide_sighted_diaspora.title: Ultraviolet Night Tracker
wide_sighted_diaspora.daily_loop_hint: Track fugitives and hostile parties at night using species near-UV vision; the diaspora's quiet response to threats against its people.
wide_sighted_diaspora.starting_sublocation_hint: a safehouse near the Philadelphia-PG County migration corridor
wide_sighted_diaspora.notes: You see what people do when they think they are unwatched. The knowledge accumulates. Your trust in baseline humans erodes.

wide_sighted_diaspora.title: Diaspora Militia Captain
wide_sighted_diaspora.daily_loop_hint: Train and command the diaspora's forming militia; prepare for the moment the polity declaration makes the militia official.
wide_sighted_diaspora.starting_sublocation_hint: a training yard in a West Philadelphia diaspora block
wide_sighted_diaspora.notes: The polity has not yet declared. When it does, the first two weeks will be decisive and violent.

wide_sighted_diaspora.title: Assembly Motion Runner
wide_sighted_diaspora.daily_loop_hint: Carry formal motions, votes, and testimony between the Philadelphia and DC-corridor assemblies; attend debate sessions as a witness.
wide_sighted_diaspora.starting_sublocation_hint: a runner's room above an assembly hall on Lancaster Avenue
wide_sighted_diaspora.notes: Motions you carry become policy. Delay a vote and consequence lands on the motion's author.

wide_sighted_diaspora.title: Cross-Cluster Diplomat
wide_sighted_diaspora.daily_loop_hint: Negotiate between the Philadelphia and DC-corridor Wide-Sighted centers; maintain back-channel relations with Bourse and Continuity.
wide_sighted_diaspora.starting_sublocation_hint: a diplomat's office near Temple University
wide_sighted_diaspora.notes: Two million people wait on the declaration. Your back-channel conversations decide who backs the declaration when it happens.

wide_sighted_diaspora.title: Wide-Sighted Cluster Physician
wide_sighted_diaspora.daily_loop_hint: Medical care for Wide-Sighted physiology; manage species-specific vision conditions, metabolic strain, and cross-cluster referrals.
wide_sighted_diaspora.starting_sublocation_hint: a clinic in a West Philadelphia diaspora block
wide_sighted_diaspora.notes: Wide-Sighted physiology is different. The baseline texts get you halfway. The cluster's own notes get you the rest.

raider_warband_cross_bronx.title: Lieutenant to the Reaper
raider_warband_cross_bronx.daily_loop_hint: Second-in-command to one of the Reaper's field captains; plan raids, enforce discipline, represent the band in parleys.
raider_warband_cross_bronx.starting_sublocation_hint: a fortified block in the Cross-Bronx Expressway corridor
raider_warband_cross_bronx.notes: The band is loyalty forged by what you have done together. There is no leaving without becoming a target.

raider_warband_cross_bronx.title: Kinetic Smasher
raider_warband_cross_bronx.daily_loop_hint: The band's heavy hitter; break gates, crush opposition, lead the charge when a raid goes loud.
raider_warband_cross_bronx.starting_sublocation_hint: a crew house in the Cross-Bronx corridor
raider_warband_cross_bronx.notes: Your power shortens your life. The band's medics can patch meat, not mineralizing tissue. You knew this signing on.

raider_warband_cross_bronx.title: Dread-Zone Raid Caster
raider_warband_cross_bronx.daily_loop_hint: Cast a dread-zone ahead of raid entry; defenders' resolve breaks before the band crosses the threshold.
raider_warband_cross_bronx.starting_sublocation_hint: a cellar flat in the Cross-Bronx corridor
raider_warband_cross_bronx.notes: The zone fixes you toward dread over years. You stop distinguishing your own fear from the field's. The Reaper asks if you hear it singing.

raider_warband_cross_bronx.title: Scavenge Crew Leader
raider_warband_cross_bronx.daily_loop_hint: Lead a scavenge crew through Bronx and upper Manhattan salvage sites; answer to the band for volume and quality.
raider_warband_cross_bronx.starting_sublocation_hint: a fortified garage near the Bronx waterfront
raider_warband_cross_bronx.notes: Physical work for the band's bulk income. Your crew's survival rate is your promotion ticket.

raider_warband_cross_bronx.title: Stolen-Goods Factor
raider_warband_cross_bronx.daily_loop_hint: Fence raid take through Brooklyn Tower Lord factors and Iron Crown black-market contacts; keep the band liquid.
raider_warband_cross_bronx.starting_sublocation_hint: a back-office shop in the Cross-Bronx corridor
raider_warband_cross_bronx.notes: You know who buys what. Your rolodex is the band's liquidity; losing it ends careers, sometimes yours.

raider_warband_cross_bronx.title: Band Field Medic
raider_warband_cross_bronx.daily_loop_hint: Treat raid injuries, infection, and torture aftermath in a raider compound infirmary; work with limited supplies and no official license.
raider_warband_cross_bronx.starting_sublocation_hint: an infirmary in a fortified block near the Major Deegan
raider_warband_cross_bronx.notes: The band patches its own because no hospital will. You know the names of every raid and what came back from it.
